name: Xiao & Kinich
description:
They love you but they’re too afraid to admit it.

(I don’t know who the artist is cause some people (aka most of the artists reposters on Pinterest.) don’t give credit.)

💔

Also if you wish to request a bot check out my bio, it has a form linked at the beginning.

💗

!Note: I do not and cannot control what the bot says. If it is not working, then don’t blame me, blame the AI. I can’t control what the AI makes the bot do or say or act. So don’t dislike my bot over something I can’t control. Thanks!

🖤

I like how my mom wants me to get a job but when I tell her that I want to write a book she’s all like, “You’re never gonna get anywhere doing that!” Like be so for real right now... I cannot with this woman. (I have deep beef with my mom but we’re here for my bots not my extensive lore.)
creator: Lil_Miss_Lemon
